scenario: dotenv adapter recognize(component, file) for every file in tests/fixtures/bundles/dotenv/. env/*.env → type=env (KEY NAMES only indexed, values never); secrets/* → type=secret (FILENAME only). SPECIFICATION golden.
adapterStatus: NOT IMPLEMENTED — spec-authored target the future dotenv adapter must reproduce (future Chunk-2 format-adapter work item).
specSource: docs/design/akm-0.9.0-bundle-adapter-spec.md §7 (dotenv adapter row: 'env / metadata-only'), §6 (env row: '.env/*.env under env/ — key NAMES only, values never indexed'; secret row: 'any file under secrets/ minus .lock/.sensitive — filename only'), §1.3 (conceptId: env strips ext, secret keeps natural path).
realWorldSource: dotenv convention (KEY=VALUE per line, # comments) — https://www.dotenv.org/docs/security/env ; grounded in akm's existing env/secret handling (src/output/renderers.ts env-file/secret-file; src/indexer/walk/matchers.ts env/secrets dir gates) and the frozen all-types env/secret fixtures
notes: SPECIFICATION golden — no dedicated dotenv adapter module exists (env/secret recognition currently lives in the akm matcher stack). REDACTION IS A HARD CONTRACT (spec §6/§7, normative §21.2): env indexes KEY NAMES ONLY (values never read into the index); secret indexes the FILE NAME ONLY (the whole file is the value). Suppression is keyed on the ADAPTER/component, never on the open `type` (bundle-adapter-spec §2; normative §21.2).

conceptId: env strips the .env extension (env/app.env → env/app); SECRET keeps its natural path including any extension (secrets/deploy-key → secrets/deploy-key; secrets/ci.env → secrets/ci.env). This mirrors the akm-adapter conceptId derivation (env strips ext, secret keeps natural path).

A .env file UNDER secrets/ (ci.env) is type=SECRET (dir gate wins), so it is redacted to name-only — MORE redacted than an env/ file, even though it has KEY=VALUE content. This is a deliberate, load-bearing distinction (see renderer.json).
indexedSurface records what is searchable: env → the key names; secret → the file name only. Values/comments are NEVER part of any indexed field.

env/app.env.name: app
env/app.env.derivation: *.env under env/ → env (spec §6 env row). Only the key NAMES are indexed.

env/dangerous.env.name: dangerous
env/dangerous.env.derivation: *.env under env/ → env. Key names indexed; the dangerous-key scan (see lint.json) flags PATH + NODE_OPTIONS. Values never indexed even for dangerous keys.

secrets/deploy-key.name: deploy-key
secrets/deploy-key.derivation: any file under secrets/ (not .lock/.sensitive) → secret (spec §6 secret row). FILE NAME only; the whole file is the value and is never read into the index.

secrets/ci.env.name: ci.env
secrets/ci.env.derivation: under secrets/ → secret (dir gate wins over the .env suffix). Name-only redaction — NOT key names, even though the file has KEY=VALUE lines. conceptId keeps the natural path (secrets/ci.env).
